zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Plumpton於1365年出生在英國越可爾斯波福斯時，他的父親Robert Plumpton IV26歲，母親Isabella Scrope28歲。他於1382年與Alice Gisburn在英國英格蘭越可爾約克結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1405年6月8日在他的家鄉享年40歲，埋葬在英國越可爾斯波福斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Plumpton于1365年出生在英国越可爾斯波福斯时，他的父亲Robert Plumpton IV26岁，母亲Isabella Scrope28岁。他于1382年与Alice Gisburn在英国英格兰越可爾約克结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1405年6月8日在他的家乡享年40岁，埋葬在英国越可爾斯波福斯。

nameMeanings.name: Plumpton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called with Old English plūme, plȳme ‘plum, plum tree’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, including Plumpton (Yorkshire, Northamptonshire, Sussex, Cumbria), Fieldplumpton or Woodplumpton (Lancashire), Plympton (Devon), and a lost Plumpton in Kingsbury (Warwicks).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Plumpton was born in 1365, in Spofforth, Yorkshire, England, his father, Robert Plumpton IV, was 26 and his mother, Isabella Scrope, was 28. He married Alice Gisburn in 1382, in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 8 June 1405, in his hometown, at the age of 40, and was buried in Spofforth, Yorkshire, England.

fr.Plumpton,Yorkshire,England: Plumpton by Ecclesall, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Plumpton est né en 1365, à Spofforth, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Robert Plumpton IV, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Isabella Scrope, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Alice Gisburn en 1382, à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 8 juin 1405, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à Spofforth, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Plumpton 1365 in Spofforth, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Plumpton IV 26 und seine Mutter Isabella Scrope 28. Er hat 1382 in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Alice Gisburn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 8. Juni 1405 im Alter von 40 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Spofforth, Yorkshire, England begraben.

Lui sposato Alice Gisburn nel 1382, nel York, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Plumptonが1365年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスプオフォースで生まれた時，父Robert Plumpton IVは26歳，母Isabella Scropeは28歳であった。1382年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークでAlice Gisburnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1405年6月8日に故郷で40歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアスプオフォースにて埋葬された。

ko.Plumpton, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 플럼프턴 비 치레사

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Plumpton(이)가 1365년 영국 요르크실르 스포포스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Plumpton IV(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella Scrope(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1382년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 요르크에서 Alice Gisburn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1405년 6월 8일 그의 고향에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 스포포스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Plumpton nasceu em 1365, em Spofforth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Plumpton IV, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Scrope, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Gisburn em 1382, em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de junho de 1405, em sua cidade natal, com 40 anos, e foi sepultado em Spofforth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Plumpton,Yorkshire,England: плумптон би экклесалл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Plumpton родился в 1365 г. в местности споффорт, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Plumpton IV было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella Scrope, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Gisburn в 1382 г. в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 8 июня 1405 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности споффорт, еркшир, Англия.

es.Plumpton,Yorkshire,England: Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Plumpton nació en 1365, en Spofforth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Plumpton IV, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Isabella Scrope, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Alice Gisburn en 1382, en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 8 de junio de 1405, en su pueblo, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultado en Spofforth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
